title: Favourite Number
description: Volodymyr’s favourite number is A and it has an odd number of positive divisors. When you add K to this number, the resulting sum also has an odd number of positive divisors. Given K, find all possible values of A, Volodymyr’s favourite number.
input: The only line of input contains K, a positive integer not exceeding 109.
output: On the first line, print the number of possible values of A. On the second line, print all possible values of A in ascending order, separated by a single space.
hint: Note that since zero has infinitely many divisors, it cannot be classified as a number with an odd number of divisors.
source: , Contest, Waterloo's local Programming Contests, 29 September, 2019
